name: Surge Path: Unstable Capacitor
additional_info: Turns your Thundercall abilities blurple. Shock is replaced with Surge Rods, a stacking status effect that Overloads upon applying five Rods and then landing an attack that would apply a sixth, consuming all of the Rods. Each Rod has an individual 30 second duration. Surge Overloads deal 2.5 Thundercall damage per Rod with 5 Thundercall scaling to Overloaded target, gaining 0.0125 damage per Thundercall investment, and 2 Thundercall damage per Rod in an AoE that does not hit the Overloaded target.
desc: Your lightning no longer applies Shock, instead apply Surge. At maximum stacks of Surge, your opponents will Overload, sending arcs of lightning in every direction.
